alerts.desc: No CSP header found. This allows potential XSS attacks.
alerts.recommendation: Add Content-Security-Policy header in Vercel config or meta tag.

alerts.desc: Page can be embedded in iframes (clickjacking risk).
Legacy XSS protection header not set (modern browsers use CSP instead).
alerts.recommendation: Add X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block (or rely on CSP).

alerts.desc: No referrer policy. Full URL may be sent to external sites.
No permissions policy restricting browser features.
alerts.recommendation: Add Permissions-Policy to restrict camera, microphone, etc.
Remove or obfuscate Server header to prevent fingerprinting.

alerts.desc: Site served over HTTPS with TLS encryption.

alerts.alert: No Cookies Set on Initial Load
alerts.desc: No Set-Cookie headers on initial page load.
React framework auto-escapes JSX output, providing built-in XSS protection.
alerts.recommendation: ✅ React provides built-in XSS protection via JSX escaping.

alerts.desc: Application uses Firebase/Firestore (NoSQL). Traditional SQL injection is not applicable.
alerts.recommendation: ✅ Not applicable — NoSQL database in use.
